title: How to delete a Portfolio board
excerpt:
Good morning, 
We just got our Monday account and we’re trying to configure the workspace for our team. I created a portfolio draft, but it didn’t work out. I am not trying to delete to keep the account clean. However, I…

posts.author: nmcgowan (nadia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning,

We just got our Monday account and we’re trying to configure the workspace for our team. I created a portfolio draft, but it didn’t work out. I am not trying to delete to keep the account clean. However, I seem to be unable to delete it.

Is there anything specific I need to do to delete a portfolio board? There are no subitem boards in the workspace.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nadia!

To confirm, did you create this board or did it come with your account when you first logged in?

If it was already in your account as a template board, these can’t be deleted. However, if you created this board, you could be able to delete following these instructions:

If you no longer need your board, you can choose to delete or archive it by clicking on the three-dot menu at the top right of your board and then select either “Archive board” or “Delete board”.

Does this help? Or did you already try these steps?

posts.author: pepees (Paul)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, @CharlotteK.

I am having the same issue. After testing the portfolio board, I am unable to delete it - the option is simply greyed out. Following an advise that I found on the community forum, I created a folder, moved the unnecessary board there, and then archived it. The method did not delete the board, but at least it no longer clutters the workspace.

I now noticed that an additional column named “link to New Portfolio” was created on each of the boards that I used earlier to connect to the portfolio board as well as “project health” status badges next to the board titles. The columns cannot be deleted, either.

posts.author: mihai.oprisenescu (Mihai Oprisenescu)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same problem. I cant delete the portofolio. I just deleted the projects form inside the portofolio, but the portofolio itself cant be deleted! what a %^%^

posts.author: matestia (mat)
posts.cookedHtml:
I got the exat same issue :
I created a portfolio board just to test it : impossible to delete it.
Worst : it created a new timeline column on the board I added as a project in this new portfolio board and I can’t delete this new column neither. Very annoying !!!

posts.author: davide.monticelli (Davide)
posts.cookedHtml:
A partial solution for me is :

  • Create a folder
  • Move the portfolio in the folder
  • Delete the folder
  • Portfolio disappear ( but it is archived and not deleted )

posts.author: RichSapien (Rich Sapien)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having the same issue. Archiving doesn’t make any sense.

posts.author: kasperhusted (Kasper Husted)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also having trouble deleting a portfolio. Very strange

posts.author: Kkolman (Kristen Kolman)
posts.cookedHtml: I had the same issue with “Delete” grayed out. I created a folder, put the portfolio board under it, and delete the folder. This deleted the board as well. Odd workaround, but it did work.
